title: ah custom runner envelope
description: Envelope emitted on stdout by a configured [runners.custom.<name>] command. Each object in findings MUST conform to check-output.schema.json#/$defs/finding.

exit_code.description: The custom runner process exit code as observed by ah.

passed.description: True when the runner considers the invocation successful.

findings.description: Normalized findings produced by the runner; items conform to check-output.schema.json#/$defs/finding.
